company_name: BlackRock MuniYield Michigan Quality Fund, Inc.
description: BlackRock MuniYield Michigan Quality Fund, Inc. is a closed-ended fixed income mutual fund launched by BlackRock, Inc. It is managed by BlackRock Advisors, LLC. The fund invests in the fixed income markets of the United States. It primarily invests in investment grade, long-term municipal obligations exempt from federal income taxes and Michigan income taxes. BlackRock MuniYield Michigan Quality Fund, Inc. was formed on October 30, 1992 and is domiciled in the United States.
mos_flag: NO — yield does not compensate for business risk
s1a: YES — business model is understandable (Financial Services)
